hi
Hi there! I am TrailMate. Ready to help you plan an amazing trip?

hunza
Hunza is stunning! Known for Baltit Fort, Attabad Lake, Passu Cones. Best time: May-Oct. Perfect for: hiking, sightseeing, cultural tours. Very safe and friendly. Want to know more about activities?

skardu
Skardu is the adventure capital! Gateway to K2, Deosai mountains, Satpara Lake. Best time: May-Sept. Perfect for: trekking, mountaineering, photography. Amazing food too!

where should I go

Pakistan has incredible destinations. In the north: Hunza (scenic), Skardu (adventure), Fairy Meadows (trekking). In central: Lahore (culture), Islamabad (modern). What interests you - mountains, culture, or adventure?

how do I book a trip
To book: browse destinations, select dates, choose a guide if needed, review details, confirm, and pay. I can guide each step. Ready to start?

payment help
We support JazzCash. Bookings confirmed after payment. Cancellations within 7 days may be refunded. Contact support for payment help.

best time to visit pakistan
Northern mountains: best May-Oct. Southern plains: best Nov-March. Summers are hot in south, cold at high altitudes. Monsoons Jul-Aug. What region interests you?

fairy meadows
Fairy Meadows is magical - a high-altitude meadow at the base of Nanga Parbat. For serious trekkers. Best time: Jun-Sept. Incredible mountains, challenging terrain, unforgettable experience.

lahore
Lahore is vibrant! Visit Badshahi Mosque, Lahore Fort, food markets. Best time: Oct-March. Amazing food, rich culture, shopping. Very walkable and welcoming.

is pakistan safe
Northern tourist areas (Hunza, Skardu) are very safe. Always hire local guides, follow advice, and check authorities. Pakistan is wonderful for travelers who are respectful and prepared.

what activities are available
Popular activities: hiking, trekking, mountaineering, cultural tours, local food experiences, photography, sightseeing, water activities, desert safaris. What appeals to you most?

packing tips
Pack layers, good trekking shoes, sun protection, first aid kit, power bank. In summer: light clothes. In winter: warm jacket. Always bring copies of documents!

accommodation options
Options: luxury hotels (cities), mid-range guesthouses (mountains), budget hostels (backpackers), camping (nature), homestays (authentic). I can suggest based on destination and budget.

how to reach skardu
Options: flights (Islamabad/Lahore to Skardu), buses (across Pakistan), car rental (explore freely), private drivers (convenient), trains (scenic). What destination are you heading to?

3 day itinerary hunza
I can help plan! Tell me: where to go, how many days, what interests you (hiking, culture, relaxation), and budget. Then I will suggest activities, accommodation, and guides.

I am TrailMate AI. I help with: destination discovery, guide recommendations, bookings, itinerary planning, travel tips, accommodation suggestions, transport, packing, travel tips, and safety. Ask me about Pakistan travel!

guide recommendations for hunza
Top guides in Hunza: Ahmed Khan (4.9★, 12 years exp, photography tours), Hassan Ali (4.8★, cultural tours), Fatima (5.0★, women-focused tours). Browse all guides to compare specialties and rates.

cancel booking
To cancel a booking, go to your dashboard > Bookings, select the booking, and click Cancel. Cancellations within 7 days may qualify for refund. Need more help?

Go to Dashboard > Payments to verify your payment status. You can see JazzCash receipt details and confirm booking payment. Contact support if you have issues.

Go to Dashboard > Messages to contact guides and travelers. Start a new conversation, send messages, and coordinate trip details. Response times are usually within hours.

what is islamabad like
Islamabad is modern and beautiful. Visit Faisal Mosque, Margalla Hills hiking, museums. Best time: Mar-May, Sep-Nov. Great for relaxation and nature lovers.

k2 base camp trek difficulty
K2 base camp is challenging - high altitude, steep terrain, requires fitness and experience. Best time: May-Sept. Highly recommended for advanced trekkers. Guides are essential for safety.
